name: Blitzkuchen Mit Apfeln (Apple Cake)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Butter; To Grease Cake Pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not combine the egg yolks as they will be used separately.
2. Peel the apples, cut them in half, and remove the core.
3. Make decorative lengthwise slits in the apples, about 1/2-inch deep. Sprinkle with lemon juice and sugar.
4. Set aside.
5. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
6. Add the egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. Gradually add the lemon juice and grated peel to the mixture.
8. Sift the baking powder and flour together, then gradually mix into the batter.
9. Stir in the milk and rum until combined.
10. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
11. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter.
12. Grease a springform pan generously with butter and vegetable oil.
13. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and arrange apple halves on top.
14. Brush the apples with oil.
15. Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
16. Remove from the pan and sprinkle with confectioners' sugar before serving.
